name: Oslo (Norway)

colors.symbolism: the field — heraldic colour of Oslo's arms

description: A blue field bearing the coat of arms of Oslo: Saint Hallvard, the city's patron saint, seated on a throne with a millstone tied to a woman lying at his feet.
history: Oslo is the capital and most populous city of Norway. The city's coat of arms depicts Saint Hallvard, its patron saint, holding three arrows and a millstone, with a naked woman at his feet — a depiction of his martyrdom.

features.role: Coat of arms of Oslo (Saint Hallvard)
